botcomponent.description: Recommend a discount percentage and new price for each slow-moving product, respecting pricing guardrails that come from the Store Policy Agent (never hardcode them). Use after sales-analysis-chart has identified slow movers and after fetching the markdown guardrails via the Store Policy Agent's get_markdown_policy. The skill generates and runs Python that applies the max-discount cap and margin floor, computes the new price and margin, flags items that cannot be meaningfully promoted within the floor for clearance instead, and renders a recommended-discount chart.
botcomponent.name: markdown-optimizer
